1 11.11 11 INT” “WWI“ “" ‘ “I" ”II- ‘W~‘m-1 1 1 111 11111 1 “min—.1111-1._....._.._._.___._ .._.. . -- 2 of 4 -- [$1171 lI—W 3(ii)] W T=Fl W : W And whereas, filrther references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, 1987, requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid, in terms of sub-section(3) of section 5 of the said Act; And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Government extended from time to time the period of making the said report, till the 5‘h February, 2013; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in view the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months afier the 5th February, 2013; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub- section (3) of section 5 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby further extends the period, within which the said Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day of August, 2013, and for that purpose, makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources, number S,O.905(E), dated the 5'h August, 2003, namely:- In the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2013”, the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of August, 2013” shall be substituted. [ F. No. 15/3/85—|.T.] DHRUV VlJAI SINGH, Secy. -- 3 of 4 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART ll—~SF.C. 3(ii)] Footnote :— The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal 1.14.].1 1 was published in the Gazette of lndia vide number 8.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 and subsequently amended vide number 8.0. 666(E), dated the 10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, so. 889(E), dated the 5th August, 2004, so. 166(E), dated the 4th February, 2005, 5.0. 1093(E), dated the 4th August, 2005, 8.0. 133(E), dated the 3rd February, 2006, 8.0. 1218(E), dated the 28th July, 2006, 8.0. 104(E), dated the 2nd February, 2007, 8.0. 1112(E), dated the 6th July, 2007, 8.0. 212(E), dated the 30th January, 2008, 5,0. 1700(E), dated the 16th July, 2008, 8.0. 397(E), dated the 4th February, 2009; so. 1812(E), dated the 23ml July, 2009, so. 2030;), dated the 29th January, 2010, 8.0. 1920(E), dated the 5th August, 2010, 8.0. 250(E), dated the 4‘h February, 2011, so. 1803 (E), dated the 5Lh August, 2011, so. 216(E), dated the 3'd February, 2012 and so. 1736 (E), dated the 3rd August, 2012.
